# NIP-32 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
NIP-32: Labeling. New event kind: `kind:1985`. Tags: `L` (label namespace), `l` (label). `L` tags are recommended for searching by namespace. `l` tags must include a mark matching an `L` tag value. Label targets: `e`, `p`, `a`, `r`, or `t` tags. Example events: labeling pubkeys, reporting violence, moderation suggestions, license assignment. Self-reporting: `l` and `L` tags can be added to other event kinds.

### PINNED_FACTS
